testcase.name: test_auth_status_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Auth status endpoint issue: 404 assert 404 in [200, 401] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration29.py:86: in test_auth_status_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 401], f"Auth status endpoint issue: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Auth status endpoint issue: 404 E assert 404 in [200, 401] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
